headline: Sedition charges target 7 academics in 18 months
context: Seven university academics faced sedition investigations between mid-2023 and end of 2024 for publishing research and commentary on sensitive topics.

cards.big: 7 academics investigated for sedition over published research since 2023
cards.sub: Topics ranged from constitutional reform to race relations analysis

cards.big: Universities and University Colleges Act 1971 restricts academic expression
cards.sub: UUCA Section 15 combined with Sedition Act creates double jeopardy for scholars

cards.big: Academic Freedom Index ranked Malaysia 128th of 179 countries in 2024
cards.sub: Self-censorship widespread among 67% of surveyed university staff

cards.big: 3 of 7 investigated academics subsequently left Malaysian universities
cards.sub: Brain drain accelerates when scholarship becomes legally dangerous

cards.big: Investigating academics for research findings attacks knowledge itself
Academics for Peace coalition collected 2,800 signatures demanding UUCA reform
